# This test verifies that MMA repair correctly up-replicates under-replicated
# ranges. All 10 ranges start with a single replica on s1 but have RF=3,
# meaning MMA's repair logic must add 2 voters per range across the 6-node
# cluster spanning 3 regions.
#
# Expected outcome: all ranges reach RF=3 (no under-replicated ranges).

gen_cluster nodes=6 region=(a,b,c) nodes_per_region=(2,2,2)
----

# Create ranges with 1 replica each, all on s1.
gen_ranges ranges=10 repl_factor=1 placement_type=skewed
----

# Override span config to require RF=3, making all ranges under-replicated.
set_span_config
[0,9999999999): num_replicas=3 num_voters=3
----

assertion type=conformance under=0
----

eval duration=10m seed=42 cfgs=(mma-repair) metrics=(replicas,leases)
----
mma-repair:
leases#1: first: [s1=6, s2=2, s3=2, s4=0, s5=0, s6=0] (stddev=2.13, mean=1.67, sum=10)
leases#1: last:  [s1=6, s2=2, s3=2, s4=0, s5=0, s6=0] (stddev=2.13, mean=1.67, sum=10)
leases#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=0%)
replicas#1: first: [s1=6, s2=2, s3=2, s4=0, s5=0, s6=0] (stddev=2.13, mean=1.67, sum=10)
replicas#1: last:  [s1=8, s2=2, s3=9, s4=1, s5=5, s6=5] (stddev=2.89, mean=5.00, sum=30)
replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%, s6=0%]  (sum=0%)
hash: 971a2767303d8ad3
==========================
